input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.1.8.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

T.1.8.5 (EV only) The Accumulator Container must not be part of the Firewall

final_answer: (EV only) The Accumulator Container must not be part of the Firewall
